/usr/bin/clang++ -g -Og -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/deps/catch2/catch_amalgamated.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/bsdfs/conductor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/instance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/stb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/streaming.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/tinyexr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/transform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/core/xml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/emissions/lambertian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/integrators/albedo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/integrators/aov.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/integrators/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/integrators/direct.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/integrators/normal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/integrators/pathtracer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/lights/area.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/lights/directional.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/lights/envmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/lights/point.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/postprocessing/denoising.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/samplers/halton.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/samplers/independent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/shapes/group.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/shapes/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/shapes/rectangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/shapes/sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/tests/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/textures/checkerboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yoldas.dir/src/textures/constant.cpp.o deps/miniz/libminiz.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libOpenImageDenoise.2.3.2.dylib
